items.title: Millions promised for mental health housing support undelivered, years after royal commission
items.summary: The Victorian government is accused of abandoning a funding commitment intended to stop Victorians living with mental illness from falling through the cracks of the housing crisis.

items.title: Blacktown and Hills Shire mayors call for greater contributions from developers towards local infrastructure
items.summary: Blacktown and the Hills Shire are some of Sydney's fastest-growing spots, but the mayors of both local government areas say they have no way to fund the infrastructure to match.

items.title: A year on from floods, north Queensland retirees yet to return home due to delays to insurance repairs
items.summary: It was meant to be their retirement dream, but north Queenslanders have been out of their homes for over a year awaiting flood insurance repairs.

items.title: Booroolong frogs return to north-west NSW waterways thanks to breeding program
items.summary: Hidden in the dark of night, more than 1,000 endangered frogs have been released back into waterways in north-west NSW.

items.title: Trump lists four goals in Iran as Middle East war widens

items.summary: Labor has announced a plan for further funding to expand out of school hours care, while the Liberal Party now supports the concept of free schools and is demanding a freight bypass to get trucks off city roads.

items.summary: IBAC's public apology to Jana Katerinskaja is a sharp reminder of the struggle for accountability victims of police-perpetrated family violence too often face.

items.title: Former patients of gynaecologist Simon Gordon not included in Epworth Hospital review

items.summary: Daniil Medvedev says he is unsure when he will be able to leave Dubai after the exchange of air strikes between the US, Israel and Iran shut down the UAE airport.

items.title: Wilcannia Weir project delayed for decades gets delayed again by funding shortfall

items.title: Crocodile spotted in suburban Newcastle creek captured

items.summary: North Queensland's Las Vegas hangover will extend well beyond a shock loss to Newcastle, with Braidon Burns receiving a two-match ban.

items.summary: The baby boy found at a south Canberra fire station in November last year is "safe" and "thriving" in foster care, as the ACT government issues a fresh appeal for information.

items.title: Randa Abdel-Fattah appears at alternative Adelaide Writers' Week event
items.summary: Palestinian Australian author Randa Abdel-Fattah has appeared at an alternative Adelaide Writers' Week event, telling a sold-out crowd journalists "muted" and "censored" Palestinian people amid the Gaza war.

items.title: 'Bittersweet' victory for traditional owners after mining damage to East Kimberley burial site

items.title: The Nightcliff by-election is this weekend. Here is why it's happening and how to vote
